scripts.release: tauri version patch && npm run release:finish
scripts.release:minor: tauri version minor && npm run release:finish
scripts.release:major: tauri version major && npm run release:finish
scripts.release:finish: git add -A && git commit -m "Release v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git push && git push --tags
